descriptions.value: Known to be a haven for treasure seeking adventurers.
The path to adventure is ever-winding and unpredictable.
The paths to exploration and riches are paved with the blood of failure.
Your home city where plans are forged and adventures are made.
The Swamp of Hopelessness is a most feared destination for any would-be adventurer.
Drunk and violent.
They disappeared in the house.
A loving mother.
You should control your mind.
He was brutally murdered in his room.
High-impulse accelerating platform.
Strong enemy with unbreakable forcefied
Simple scout drone
High-power energy cell array system called "Slicer"
Battle drone. Fast and furious.
Uh oh. Hope you made a backup.
It's the only way out!
I'm too young to be deleted!
Escape or be deleted!
The first boss - dive-attacks and bomb drops
The second boss - a nasty worm
The third boss - up and down, round and round
The fourth boss (UFO) - it's a UFO, yes
The fourth boss (monster) - rotating lasers and fireworks
The Main Character of Labyronia.
Strange Elf Lady found in the mystical forest.
Old man on a bridge over a river giving hints on the future of your mission.
Darek is ready to inform you of whatever you need to know for your journey.
Unlucky man that will share his sorrow in the local bar.
Trooper will fight to defend his alien family.
Trooper will fight for Alien Lord
Durable piece of alien ship!
Weak but agile!
Will fight aliens to have something to tell to children in old age.
The first ship you will use.
With this ship, its ok to be a square.
Make sure to dress properly while you fly through space.
Only true heroes wear bow ties.
When the going gets tough, better bring an axe!
Incitement 3 - Adrial
Incitement 3 - Anku
Incitement 3 - Darmek
Incitement 3 - Eryn
Incitement 3 - Hesper
Incitement 3 - Razail
Incitement 3 - Sarlene
Incitement 3 - Sepharia
Incitement 3 - Telran
The Hive cares little for the interests of other races. Speak quickly. We hunger.
In their original form these relentless war machines may have been sleeker and cleaner, but they were just as hungry.
Be content! Fortune smiles upon you, for you have the joy of gazing upon Horatio.
The Four Families extend their greetings and hope for a profitable relationship.
We are Riftborn. We come into your untidy cosmos on a mission of survival.
Welcome to the Sophonity. There are some among us who doubt your intellectual chops. Please prove them wrong.
The United Empire welcomes all who embrace its ideals. May our future be prosperous.
In the name of the Heart and of harmony, the Unfallen greet you.
The Vodyani and the Holy Church of the Virtual Saints greet you. May their blessings be with you.
A great dreamer and adventure lover, like all teenagers, though.
In spite of his bravery, decisiveness and serious appearance, he is very kind and modest guy.
A girl fidget. She can't stay in one place for long. One day she'll visit all flying islands.
Science became his vocation. That is what he spends most of his free time on.
The Wild Island dweller. Wild, but attractive.
Having previously worked for the Emperor, Stiletta is a hardened and skilled Black Mage with flirtatious tendencies. She prefers to keep her past private and to focus on the tasks at hand.

descriptions.name: Stiletta
descriptions.type: Epic Quest of the 4 Crystals Trading Card

descriptions.value: Theodore has been taking care of his single mother for years. He has a knack for sword fighting and physical labour. For thinking... not so much. But that's what a sword is for, right? He loves adventure but has never left Farmville.

descriptions.name: Theodore
descriptions.type: Epic Quest of the 4 Crystals Trading Card

descriptions.value: A dwarf who cares about the earth and nature, but has been separated from the rest of its kind in a traumatic event.

descriptions.name: Zipadeedo
descriptions.type: Epic Quest of the 4 Crystals Trading Card

descriptions.value: After her parents were arrested for murder, Mary was taken in by the local church to become a Sister. She has a tough and carefree attitude. It is hard to break her spirit! Though SHE loves breaking things. But who doesn't?

descriptions.name: Mary
descriptions.type: Epic Quest of the 4 Crystals Trading Card

descriptions.value: "Opaka, merchant extraordinaire at your service!" and Theodore's loving mother, who keeps trying to set him up with Mary, a Sister at the Church. Yes, Sisters may get married.

descriptions.name: Opaka & Mom
descriptions.type: Epic Quest of the 4 Crystals Trading Card

descriptions.value: The main character of the game and hero of the land.
Will give our hero missions and always has something that he needs help with.
Citizens are always around and willing to give advice when asked.
Citizens are always walking around and willing to give advice.  The female citizens also offer advice about your attire when asked.
Your trusted mechanic that can repair your ship when needed.
Young and ambitious Price.
Sweet and old Mrs. Goodwin.
Red and proud Mr. McDade.
Blue and brash Mr. Bruton.
Green and greedy Mr. Moore.
Meet the elephant.
Crime fighter and protector of the city of Shadowlawn, the somewhat rotund comic superhero of our adventure, Fatman!

descriptions.name: Fatman
descriptions.type: The Adventures of Fatman Trading Card

descriptions.value: Toxicman, a glowing, toxic mutation seeks revenge after a corporate sabotage leaves him disfigured and lacking any cool, actual real superpowers.

descriptions.name: Toxicman
descriptions.type: The Adventures of Fatman Trading Card

descriptions.value: Trusty companion and clever-bot, the Fat Computer helps relay information and advice in the most enthusiastic of tones.

descriptions.value: Itchy Eddie, one of many shady and decidedly dangerous characters in the city of Shadowlawn. Further details about him are unknown...

Born a king but not of the world of Urizen,  Draconan was but a King of "Great Beauty".  Married to Arguine of Urizen Draconan bore many children.  He is a great force to reckon with.  A beast with metallic like "rubble" skin that heals almost instantly from any wound not severe.
This item can no longer be bought or sold on the Community Market.

descriptions.name: Lord Draconan
descriptions.type: Urizen Shadows of the Cold Deluxe Frosty Edition Trading Card

tags.localized_tag_name: Urizen Shadows of the Cold Deluxe Frosty Edition

descriptions.value: Taken throne Merciless son of Elder King Urek has vowed to bring his kingdom to peace.  With an army by his side and a mission to conquer,  Merc has but one thing on his mind...blood.
This item can no longer be bought or sold on the Community Market.

descriptions.name: King Merciless
descriptions.type: Urizen Shadows of the Cold Deluxe Frosty Edition Trading Card

tags.localized_tag_name: Urizen Shadows of the Cold Deluxe Frosty Edition

descriptions.value: Born a sea mermaid Aquadane is a fierce fighter up with the ranks of one of the best.  She is armed with the mystical Staff of the AquaPearl.  Her father was a trusted friend of king Urek who kept watch the waters for his brave king.  Galaton father of Aquadyne also helped in the construction of Urizen as a kingdom whole.  His whereabouts are unknown.  Aquadane now leads the waters as warrior princess.
This item can no longer be bought or sold on the Community Market.

descriptions.name: Aquadane
descriptions.type: Urizen Shadows of the Cold Deluxe Frosty Edition Trading Card

tags.localized_tag_name: Urizen Shadows of the Cold Deluxe Frosty Edition

descriptions.value: As a bomb expert Joshua is a cool kid always working to better the lives of others.  His main goal is to please his mother Magdelyn sister of Merciless.  Hired to take down key structures of the Darkthrone he wears an awesome Robotech armor that enables him to walk into an explosion with no casualty.  Did you know Joshua Bomber is a good looking lady killer?
This item can no longer be bought or sold on the Community Market.

descriptions.name: Joshua Bomber
descriptions.type: Urizen Shadows of the Cold Deluxe Frosty Edition Trading Card

tags.localized_tag_name: Urizen Shadows of the Cold Deluxe Frosty Edition

descriptions.value: Gatekeeper is a highly worshiped shaman capable of opening portals to other dimensions.  His powers are sometimes too strong and can sometimes disrupt the space and time continuum.  He is called upon in rare occasions and is currently needed of his sorcerer capabilities to ward off enemies and intruders.  He is also immortal.
This item can no longer be bought or sold on the Community Market.

descriptions.name: Gatekeeper
descriptions.type: Urizen Shadows of the Cold Deluxe Frosty Edition Trading Card

tags.localized_tag_name: Urizen Shadows of the Cold Deluxe Frosty Edition

descriptions.value: As sister of Merciless Magdelyn is often competing with her older brother for attention.  Aside from her childish tendencies she is a very good hand to hand combatant.  She can mark and wield her harpoon at a bird yards away.  She is a tough cookie and also highly intelligent.  Belonging to her kingdoms army at top ranks she is often considered to be so precise in her battles she often does not fail to out do her brother,  and shut him up.
This item can no longer be bought or sold on the Community Market.

descriptions.name: Magdelyn
descriptions.type: Urizen Shadows of the Cold Deluxe Frosty Edition Trading Card

tags.localized_tag_name: Urizen Shadows of the Cold Deluxe Frosty Edition
